# CWE-385 safe — Covert Timing Channel (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-385-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/subtle"
	"net/http"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

func CheckApiSecret(c *GinCtx, expected string) bool {
	provided := c.Request.Header.Get("X-Api-Secret")
	return subtle.ConstantTimeCompare([]byte(provided), []byte(expected)) == 1
}
